LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_TargetLang: 【Target Language】\nSet which language the AI should translate foreign mods into.
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_Provider: 【AI Provider】\nSelect the AI model provider you want to use. Google (Gemini) or OpenAI is highly recommended.
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_EmptyKey: How can I test without an API Key!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: [Test] Test successful! AI core response is good.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestFail: [Test] Test failed! Please check network or API settings.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Init: [Init] Reading mods, establishing global translation pool...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_StartScan: Auto Translation Core started! Target mod count: {0}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipMod: [Skip] No Languages or Defs, code-only mod.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DefScan: [DefInjected] Deep scan and global comparison started...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NoMissing: [{0}] All parts present, no translation needed.
LanguageData.ATC_CancelRequested: Stop command received, emergency braking in progress...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FetchModelsFail: [System] Fetch failed, please check API Key.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NetworkRetry: [System] Network fluctuation or server busy, auto-retry triggered...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MigrateSuccess: [Migration] Successfully transferred {0}'s {1} to the new architecture!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ProcessAbortedWithSave: [System] Production line stopped safely; translated content preserved.
LanguageData.ATC_FinishMessage_Text:
Translation task completed successfully!
【Case A: First-time user】 Please go to the "Mods" list in the main menu, enable "! AutoTranslation AI Pack", drag it to the [Bottom] of the list, and then [Restart the game]!
【Case B: Translation pack already enabled】 Please go to Main Menu > Options > Language, and [Click your current language again]. The game will clear the cache and load the latest translations instantly—no restart required!
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_FullText:
【Tutorial】 1. Choose [Target Language] (Supports mutual translation between Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, Russian, Ukrainian, etc.) and [Provider]. Google (Gemini) is recommended for international players!
2. Apply for [API Key] and paste it. 🔥 V4.7 New Feature: Supports "Infinite API Magazine"! Click "+" to add multiple API interfaces; the system will auto-rotate tasks to maximize free quotas!
3. [Auto Model Detection] Once the key is pasted (length > 10), the system automatically detects models in the background—no search button needed! Select the model from the dropdown.
4. Adjust [Max Threads] (Recommended: valid keys x 3). Click the green [🚀 Start Full Scan] or use [🎯 Translate Single Mod]. Press [🛑 Emergency Stop] anytime.
5. 【🎉 Post-Translation Steps】 👉 Case A (First use): Enable "! AutoTranslation AI Pack" in the mod list, drag to the bottom, and [Restart game]! 👉 Case B (Already enabled): Go to Options > Language and [Click your current language again] to refresh settings!
【FAQ】 Q: Translation finished, but the game is still in English? A: See Step 5! First-time users must "Restart Game." If enabled, "Switch Language" to force refresh. This is a game engine limitation, not a bug!
Q: HTTP 401 / 403 error? A: Usually an incorrect API key or exhausted quota! Check for spaces or add more keys using "+"!
Q: HTTP 404 error? A: If using official APIs, ensure [Custom Base URL] is "Completely Empty"! Only third-party proxies need URLs.
Q: Log shows "Timeout" or "Waiting for retry" in red? A: API server is busy or rate-limited! The mod has built-in auto-retry and key rotation. If successes follow, just wait for it~ (≧∀≦)ゞ
Q: Connection failure or 404 with local (LM Studio / Ollama) or proxies? A: 1. Ensure [Custom Base URL] is correct (e.g., http://localhost:1234). The system auto-appends /v1! 2. API Key cannot be empty! For local, use "local-key". 3. Use the "API Endpoint URL", not the web chat URL!
Q: Local translation is slow or PC is lagging? A: AI uses heavy PC power (especially VRAM). Use smaller models (Q4_K_M) or lower [Max Threads].
Q: Where are the files? Can I share them? A: Located in RimWorld/Mods/!Translation_AI_Pack. Auto-generated packs are for [Personal Use Only]; do not share or upload to Steam Workshop!
LanguageData.ATC_UpdateLog_FullText:
--- V4.8 Ultimate Evolution (Multi-Select & Optimize) --- • Implemented [Multi-Select & Search UI]: No more sore hands! Search and select multiple mods at once with smooth "slide-to-select" feel! • Added [Skip Current Mod]: Stuck on a mod? Skip it instantly and move to the next! • Performance Boost [Asynchronous Dictionary Construction]: Fixes game freezing when loading massive mod packs. Dual progress bars for smoother operation! • Improved [Proxy & Local API Compatibility]: Perfect support for LM Studio / Ollama with "Auto-complete /v1" mechanism.
--- V4.7 Speedster Update (Ultimate) --- • First [Infinite API Magazine] system: Set multiple API interfaces (e.g., Google + DeepSeek). Round-Robin load balancing avoids limits and drains free quotas! • [High-Speed Thread Adjuster]: No longer locked at 3 threads! Up to 30 concurrent threads for lightning speed! • New [Auto Model Radar]: Background detection of available models upon pasting the key. • [Global Scroll UI]: Fixed crowded UI and missing logs with a fixed-height monitor screen!
--- V4.6 Epic Update (Ultimate) --- • Added [English, Ukrainian, Russian Reverse Translation] support. Translate Chinese mods into multiple languages! • Implemented [Individual Translation] engine for quick scanning of specific mods. • [Emergency Brake System]: Interrupt production anytime while preserving progress. • X-Ray probe upgraded to [Level 3 Recursive Deep-Dive Mode] to find hidden text. • Rewrote UI architecture for dynamic window heights. • Replaced unstable auto-hot-reload with official language switching mechanism, increasing stability by 100%!
--- V4.5 Update --- • Added [Abnormal File Detection Report] dashboard. • Implemented [Corruption Shield] to auto-skip damaged XML files. • Added auto-detection and first-use guide popups.
--- V4.3 Update --- • First [Auto Translation Production Line] introduced. • Built-in [Global Translation Memory Pool] to save API quotas. • Custom Base URL support for local models (LM Studio, Ollama, etc.).
LanguageData.ATC_ApiConfigTitle: API Interface Magazine Settings (Supports Multi-thread Rotation)
LanguageData.ATC_NoModelWaitKey: No model selected (Paste Key for auto-fetch)
LanguageData.ATC_EmptyConfigWarning: Please set at least one valid API configuration!
LanguageData.ATC_MaxThreadsTip: Recommended: Number of valid keys x 3
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiRecovered: [API] Reconnection successful! Production line resumed at high speed.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiRetry: [API] Translation busy or timeout, retrying in {0}s...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiFallback: [API] Block translation failed; starting "Solo Mode" sentence-by-sentence...
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_ApiCritical: [Critical API Error] Translation failed for text in 【{0}】! Original text preserved.
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_OldToxicFiles: 【Warning】 Old abnormal translation files detected! Forced cleanup initiated to prevent errors!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_AutoRebuildStart: 【System】 System will auto-rebuild a clean translation pack!
